rule: EXTERNAL user = an account whose created_at > frozen_at AND whose id is not in the committed pre-freeze set. All 28 pre-freeze accounts are operator/pre-launch (created 2026-07-02..2026-07-19), disclosed. This freeze makes the first real external sign-in provable rather than asserted.
note: The count and cutoff are checkable against Supabase created_at; the set is committed (not published) for privacy.
